				<article id="post-44" class="entry content-bg single-entry post-44 page type-page status-publish has-post-thumbnail hentry">
	<div class="entry-content-wrap">
		
<div class="entry-content single-content">
	<div class="kb-row-layout-wrap kb-row-layout-id44_6831e5-62 alignfull kt-row-has-bg wp-block-kadence-rowlayout"><div class="kt-row-layout-overlay kt-row-overlay-gradient"></div><div class="kt-row-column-wrap kt-has-1-columns kt-row-layout-equal kt-tab-layout-inherit kt-mobile-layout-row kt-row-valign-middle">

<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column44_b971d8-dc"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">
<p class="kt-adv-heading44_96683c-a5 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_96683c-a5">Food has been the basic necessity of mankind which urges them to explore and find new culinary delights. This was one time in 1952 when Sir Colonel Harland Sanders came out with delicious fast food recipes and named it Kentucky Fried Chicken &#8211; KFC Menu. Since then to this date all the items of KFC have become a fan favorite. But I personally have observed fans struggling to find the KFC menu prices that are latest too. To help them here is me, with this SOUTH AFRICA 2024 KFC menu article where you can find all the price and calorie information of your favorite meal. <br>Chicken Dishes<br><br></p>

<h2 id="New:-Limited-Time-Menu" class="kt-adv-heading44_1a6113-f5 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_1a6113-f5">KFC Menu Price</h2>
</div></div>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_e21826-79 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_e21826-79">It’s a random day and you started to crave something juicy, tender, sweet, or crunchy, anything? We have the solution! The ultimate KFC menu covers the food of all categories to fulfill your never-ending appetite. But before fulfilling this desire you may want to know the prices of items to keep track of your budget. For that, I’ve put together the updated prices of all items from the KFC South Africa Menu.</p>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_cd84a4-2a wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_cd84a4-2a">You can choose your meals from a range of meals like burgers, wraps, wings, or sides, depending on what you enjoy. This guide gives you the latest prices on deals along with useful nutritional information. Also, avail the promo codes and exclusive deals to enjoy even in a better way. So, let’s get into the article to find out exciting facts and information about the KFC menu.&nbsp;</p>

<h2 id="Sharing-Menu" class="kt-adv-heading44_2fc2b0-40 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_2fc2b0-40">Sharing Menu</h2>
</div></div>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_15387b-08 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_15387b-08">Sharing is caring is an old saying, but a valid one, and your beloved KFC understands it well. This is why they offered a special sharing menu, which can be ordered for large gatherings. Or you can simply dine in with your friends and treat yourself to the best from exclusive deals.&nbsp;<br>It includes Family Treat 10Pc, Family Treat 8Pc, All In One Feast, Family Fiesta, 2 Can Dine Buddy, Big 6 Deal, and others. You can try the best one after keenly analyzing them. If you want to know their latest prices and want to check the calorie information, then check the below table.</p>
</div></div>

<h2 id="Sharing-Menu" class="kt-adv-heading44_e60a96-0a wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_e60a96-0a">Bucket Menu</h2>
</div></div>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_e0230b-d8 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_e0230b-d8">Crispy and tender chicken has always been my go-to, which is why KFC remains a top choice for me. You&#8217;ll be happy to hear that they offer bucket meals on their menu. There are 3 buckets available of 9,15, and 21 tender chicken pieces. You can order according to your desire. No one is stopping you from eating extra. Let&#8217;s have a look at the below table to check the prices of these 3 bucket deals.&nbsp;</p>

<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column44_55e65f-10"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">
<h2 id="Box-Meals-" class="kt-adv-heading44_f20428-be wp-block-kadence-advancedheading has-theme-palette-9-color has-text-color" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_f20428-be">Box Meals Menu</h2>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_fe67ef-b5 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading has-theme-palette-9-color has-text-color" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_fe67ef-b5">Now this is something unique you know why? Well,&nbsp;<a href="https://kfcmenusa.co.za/kfc-box-meals-prices/">box meals</a>&nbsp;have a variety of food items like Zinger burgers, Hot wings, sides, and cold drinks which is obviously enough to freshen your mood. Well, on the KFC menu, you can find multiple box options to choose from. Each box has its own thrill like nuggets, Sugar SF, sweet dips, drinks, burgers, load fries, and many more. Not lying but it could be the fan favorite for its wide availability. In order to match the box with your budget, check the latest menu box prices in the below table.&nbsp;</p>

<div class="kb-row-layout-wrap kb-row-layout-id44_a57447-20 alignnone wp-block-kadence-rowlayout"><div class="kt-row-column-wrap kt-has-2-columns kt-row-layout-left-golden kt-tab-layout-inherit kt-mobile-layout-row kt-row-valign-top">

<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column44_2ec940-2e"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">
<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column44_f205f8-1f"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">
<h2 id="Burgers-Menu" class="kt-adv-heading44_73ffd6-c6 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_73ffd6-c6">Burgers Menu</h2>
</div></div>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_4ab914-81 has--font-size wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_4ab914-81">How many types of burgers you can eat? If I were to tell you about myself, it would be endless – and the KFC menu is perfectly fulfilling that by offering a variety of delicious burger options. It has a burger of any kind. For instance, if you love Crunch they have New Colonel Burger, Dunked Double Crunch Burger, and Double Crunch Burger to offer. If you want a light burger meal then you should try the Snack burger.&nbsp;</p>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_4de0d0-ce has--font-size wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_4de0d0-ce">If you don’t feel comfortable around this option, then they have a special veggie option known as Hash Veggie Burger. You can try any of them because each has a unique and delicious taste. Well, to check further details and calorie intake for each burger including prices refer to the table below.</p>
</div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column44_fc6dc6-4d"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">

<h2 id="Wraps-Menu" class="kt-adv-heading44_61ce61-30 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_61ce61-30">Wraps Menu</h2>
</div></div>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_b006cd-56 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_b006cd-56">Everything that is wrapped has the best combo. The same rule applies on the wraps menu of KFC. They got the Boxmaster, Jalapeño Crunch Master, Dunked Crunch Master, and Classic Twister to nourish you and lighten your mood. All of them are so mouth-watering with filled and tender inside. You must try their top-picks to have a delightful and jaw-dropping experience. Below you can check the updated prices for KFC wraps menu.&nbsp;</p>

<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column44_713ada-79"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">
<h2 id="Streetwise-Menu" class="kt-adv-heading44_3ab74d-d6 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_3ab74d-d6">Streetwise Menu</h2>
</div></div>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_47f753-ae has--font-size wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_47f753-ae">If we decide to rate all the meal categories of KFC then Streetwise lies in the 1st position. Do you know why? Well, the hot and crispy Streetwise is a one-way treat to enjoy a complete pack of meals. From hot wings to cold drinks everything is being covered within this deal. </p>



<p>You can try the chips pack, or the pops pack according to your mood. They have a minimal price which means there’s nothing to worry about the budget. For further details, you can check the price mentioned in the below table.&nbsp;</p>
</div></div>

<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column44_9ef602-d1"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">
<h2 id="Treats-Menu" class="kt-adv-heading44_d72a54-c1 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_d72a54-c1">Treats Menu</h2>
</div></div>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_4855f0-92 has--font-size wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_4855f0-92">This menu is for the sweet tooth who wants wonder drinks. It has a Mixed Berry Sundae, Strawberry Milkshake, Chocolate Milkshake, Virgin Mojito Sparkling Krusher, Strawberry Sunrise Sparkling Krusher, Kit Kat Sundae, and a lot of other options. You can try anything and any flavor purely according to your taste and preference. Here you can check the prices of each item and make your day even more delightful.&nbsp;</p>
</div></div>

<h2 id="Drinks-Menu" class="kt-adv-heading44_3f86c0-98 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_3f86c0-98">Drinks Menu</h2>

<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column44_b2447f-76"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">
<h2 class="kt-adv-heading44_25e6df-f6 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_25e6df-f6">How KFC Started?</h2>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_837307-fb wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_837307-fb">KFC started back in the 1930s with Colonel Harland Sanders, who was just a guy with a gas station and a knack for cooking. He whipped up fried chicken with a special blend of 11 herbs and spices, something he mixed up himself and kept secret. Pretty soon, folks couldn’t get enough, and word started spreading around Kentucky and beyond.<br></p>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_3b17f1-6e wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_3b17f1-6e">In 1952, Sanders took a chance and franchised his recipe, letting others share his famous chicken. The first franchise deal happened with a small restaurant in Utah, sparking the beginning of a brand that would soon expand across the U.S. and the whole world.&nbsp;<br></p>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_afd66a-b8 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_afd66a-b8">Today, KFC stands as a symbol of quality fried chicken in every corner of the world. That one man’s love for good cooking became a worldwide name, connecting families and friends over buckets of the Colonel’s original recipe.<br></p>



<h2 class="kt-adv-heading44_fb872f-c4 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading has-theme-palette-9-color has-text-color" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_fb872f-c4">Methods to Order Online from KFC South Africa</h2>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_7d6c01-6c wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_7d6c01-6c">Below are the methods that you can use to order KFC menu food online.<br></p>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading44_dcd3cc-e1 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_dcd3cc-e1">KFC Website</h3>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_601502-73 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_601502-73">You can simply order from the official website of KFC ZA by browsing the menu, picking your favorites, and adding them to your cart. You’ll need to enter your location to make sure delivery is available, then proceed with payment details. Once you’re set, just place the order, and your meal will be on its way. Here are the steps:</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Go to the KFC South Africa website and browse the full menu.</li>



<li>Select your favorite food items and add them to your cart.</li>



<li>Enter your location details to check if delivery is available in your area</li>



<li>Complete the payment process, then place your order for home delivery</li>
</ul>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading44_93d662-13 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_93d662-13">KFC App</h3>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_32f46f-7f wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_32f46f-7f">Another convenient option is to order via the app. Follow the below steps:&nbsp;</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Download the KFC South Africa app on your Android or iOS device.</li>



<li>Open the app, and explore exclusive deals and the full menu.</li>



<li>Choose your items, enter your delivery address, and pay securely through the app.</li>



<li>Sit back and relax while your food makes its way to you.</li>
</ul>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading44_85f2cc-f2 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_85f2cc-f2">KFC Delivery Services</h3>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_1fea85-2a wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_1fea85-2a">KFC South Africa also partners with popular delivery platforms like Uber Eats and Mr D Food. To avail of this method follow the below steps.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Open your Uber Eats or Mr D Food app, then search for KFC.</li>



<li>Pick the KFC items you want and add them to your order.</li>



<li>Complete payment through the delivery app, and follow real-time updates.</li>



<li>Get your meal delivered right to your door by one of their drivers.<br></li>
</ul>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading44_b7e8cc-b0 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_b7e8cc-b0">Call-In</h3>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_1f4418-81 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_1f4418-81">If you prefer a more direct approach, you can call your nearest KFC outlet, place your order over the phone, and pick it up or have it delivered.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li>Look up your nearest KFC location’s phone number online.</li>



<li>Call to place your order directly, speaking with a KFC team member.</li>



<li>Choose to pick up your order or request delivery if available.</li>



<li>Complete payment when you receive your food.</li>
</ul>



<h2 class="kt-adv-heading44_e61929-d1 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading has-theme-palette-9-color has-text-color" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_e61929-d1"><strong>KFC Menu and Breakfast Hours of Operation</strong></h2>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_2f6cb4-ae wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_2f6cb4-ae">KFC South Africa offers a variety of <a href="https://kfcmenusa.co.za/kfc-breakfast-menu/">breakfast menu</a> to start your day. On weekdays, breakfast is served from 6:00 AM to 10:30 AM. And on weekends, it&#8217;s extended until 11:00 AM.&nbsp;<br></p>

<p class="kt-adv-heading44_6a9d1e-7f wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_6a9d1e-7f">If you want to keep updated with the latest information and news about KFC South Africa then hit the below official social media accounts.&nbsp;<br></p>

<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-5 kt-pane44_e9eefa-b9"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>How much is streetwise 5?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="kt-adv-heading44_ba1bba-a9 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_ba1bba-a9">It is available for R121.90.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-6 kt-pane44_dc2f16-d5"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title"><strong>What is the price of KFC 9 pieces?</strong></span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p class="kt-adv-heading44_7beec3-e1 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_7beec3-e1">The 9-piece Chicken bucket is for R149.90.</p>
</div></div></div>
</div></div></div>
</div></div>

</div></div>


<h2 class="kt-adv-heading44_0b66c2-f4 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_0b66c2-f4"><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong><strong>Wrapping Up</strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></strong></h2>



<p class="kt-adv-heading44_2e306c-c2 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading44_2e306c-c2">In conclusion, the<strong> </strong>KFC menu and prices SA offer many delicious options that cater to every taste with KFC menu prices. From the mouth-watering Original Recipe and Hot &amp; Spicy Chicken to the flavorful burgers, wraps, sides, and desserts, KFC has something for everyone. So, KFC will satisfy your cravings, whether you&#8217;re craving a quick snack, a hearty meal, or a sweet indulgence.</p>
</div></div>
